Package com.group02.tars.entity

Class Job

java.lang.Object
com.group02.tars.entity.Job
public class Job extends Object
Job posting record stored in jobs.json.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    createdAt
    Creation date in YYYY-MM-DD form.
    String
    deadline
    Application deadline in YYYY-MM-DD form.
    String
    description
    Job description text displayed in listings and detail views.
    String
    jobId
    Unique job identifier, such as JOB001.
    String
    moduleName
    Module or course code associated with the job.
    String
    postedBy
    User id of the module organizer who posted the job.
    String
    requiredSkills
    Comma-separated skill requirements shown to applicants.
    String
    status
    Job lifecycle status, such as open, closing, or closed.
    String
    title
    Human-readable job title.
    Integer
    weeklyHours
    Expected weekly workload in hours.
